---
title: "Conferences"
page-layout: full
description: "Conference presentations and published abstracts by Mesfin Genie."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
# Conferences

Presentations and published conference abstracts.
:::
:::

::: {.prose}
## Upcoming presentations

<div class="timeline">
<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>International Conference on Choice Modelling</h3>
<p><strong>Gold Coast, Australia · 20–22 July 2026</strong><br>Attribute ordering, visual attention and choice behaviour in discrete choice experiments.</p>
</div>
<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>International Academy of Health Preference Research</h3>
<p><strong>Singapore · 5–7 October 2026</strong><br>Preferences and trade-offs for dementia support programme features: a discrete choice experiment in Australia.</p>
</div>
</div>

## Recent presentations

<div class="timeline">
<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>Choice Modelling Conference / CDIC 2026</h3>
<p><strong>Melbourne, Australia · 15–17 June 2026</strong><br><em>Community First or My Body First? Moral Values and Vaccine Mandate Preferences</em>; and <em>No Jab, No Access? Preferences for Vaccine Mandates in Europe and Australia</em>.</p>
</div>
<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>ISPOR Annual Meeting</h3>
<p><strong>Philadelphia, United States · 17–20 May 2026</strong><br><em>Choosing with Concern for the Worse-Off: Equity and Efficiency in Health Value Assessment</em>.</p>
</div>
</div>

## Published conference abstracts

<div class="publication-year-list conference-output-list">
<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491">PCR18 Are Discrete Choice Experiment Results Robust to Omitted Attributes? Evidence from a Vaccine Study</a></div>
<div class="publication-authors"><strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Verity Watson; Stéphane Luchini; Michaël Schwarzinger</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S549–S550 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491">DOI <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296">MSR145 Do Framing and Attribute Number Influence Choice Consistency in a Preference-Based Value Assessment of Equity and Efficiency?</a></div>
<div class="publication-authors"><strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S302–S303 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296">DOI <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508">MSR75 Guidance or Misdirection? Unpacking the Role of Feedback in Health Preference Assessments</a></div>
<div class="publication-authors"><strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Shelby Reed; Juan Gonzalez; Semra Ozdemir</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 27, S274 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508">DOI <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037">EPH155 Relative Effectiveness of Vaccination and Non-pharmaceutical Interventions on COVID-19 Infection and Deaths in the US</a></div>
<div class="publication-authors">Asmita P. Khatiwada; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; <strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Tim C. Lai; Nabin Poudel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S192–S193 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037">DOI <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873">PCR95 Decision Consistency in a Discrete Choice Experiment: Does Numeracy Skill Matter?</a></div>
<div class="publication-authors"><strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches; Nabin Poudel</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S329 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873">DOI <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title">Metastatic Prostate Cancer Patients’ Attitudes towards Treatment of the Local Tumour and Metastasis Evaluative Research (IP5-MATTER): A Multicentre, Discrete Choice Experiment Trial in Progress</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; <strong class="author-self">Mesfin G. Genie</strong>; Michael Gonzalez; and colleagues</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>European Urology</em>, 79, S1217–S1218 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie#publications">University record <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>

<article class="publication-record">
<div class="publication-title">A Discrete Choice Experiment on Patients’ Time and Risk Preferences in Kidney Transplantation: Patients’ Age and Willingness to Wait for Better Organs</div>
<div class="publication-authors">C. Silvestre; <strong class="author-self">Mesfin Genie</strong>; Antonio Nicolò; Giacomo Pasini; and colleagues</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Transplant International</em>, 30, 308–309 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie#publications">University record <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
</article>
</div>
:::
